p2p_enrichment.p2p_tests_added: None - existing deno_lint and deno_fmt tests are sufficient. These are the standard Deno repo CI checks for TypeScript files.
p2p_enrichment.notes: Verified existing p2p tests pass on base commit. The Deno repo CI primarily uses: 1) deno lint (via tools/lint.js or deno lint directly), 2) deno fmt/dprint for formatting, 3) cargo test/build for Rust. For this TypeScript polyfill change in ext/node/polyfills/internal/child_process.ts, the existing deno lint and deno fmt checks are the appropriate pass-to-pass gates. No new p2p tests needed.
